channel.title: Vector Mission Systems Newsroom
channel.description: Latest updates from Vector Mission Systems

item.title: Vector Mission Systems wins $42M Navy task order on SeaPort NxG
item.description: Vector Mission Systems will deliver mission planning support under the SeaPort NxG vehicle.

item.title: Vector Mission Systems achieves CMMC Level 2 certification
item.description: The company completed its latest third-party certification milestone for controlled environment work.

item.title: Vector Mission Systems opens new integration lab in Huntsville
item.description: The lab will support mission integration and prototype work.
